query: Shein marketplace seller education series 2025 product safety quality compliance topics

mako.raw:
{"query":"Shein marketplace seller education series 2025 product safety quality compliance topics","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1612,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.sheingroup.com/newsroom/shein-expands-marketplace-seller-education-offering-with-product-safety-and-quality-compliance","title":"SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series | SHEIN Group","content":"The series will cover regulatory updates, product safety requirements, testing standards, and industry best practices to help sellers navigate evolving compliance rules across global markets.
The Hub includes market and category specific guidance covering product safety requirements, prohibited and restricted products, quality standards, intellectual property protection, and operational compliance across onboarding, listing, and day-to-day operations."},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/shein-expands-marketplace-seller-education-offering-with-product-safety-and-quality-compliance-series-302796523.html","title":"SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series","content":"SINGAPORE, June 10, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, SHEIN, today announced the launch of a new product safety and quality compliance training series for marketplace sellers, delivered in collaboration with leading third-party testing, inspection and certification (TIC) organizations, including Bureau Veritas, Intertek, SGS, and TÜV SÜD."},{"url":"https://cedcommerce.com/blog/shein-expands-seller-compliance-education-with-new-product-safety-and-quality-training-series/","title":"SHEIN Launches Seller Compliance Training Series","content":"SHEIN has launched a new product safety and quality compliance training series for marketplace sellers, strengthening its seller education efforts as global scrutiny around marketplace product safety continues to rise.
Replays are available through SHEIN’s Seller Education Hub.
For SHEIN, a stronger seller education program helps position compliance as a seller enablement issue, not only an enforcement issue."},{"url":"https://www.aol.com/articles/shein-expands-marketplace-seller-education-120000000.html","title":"SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series - AOL","content":"Series began on 29 May 2026 with livestreamed training on product safety and quality compliance for children's toys by TIC partner"},{"url":"https://chainstoreage.com/shein-launches-compliance-training-sellers","title":"Shein launches compliance training for sellers | Chain Store Age","content":"A Chinese-founded and Singapore-based global on-demand fashion app is educating sellers on its marketplace about evolving international compliance rules.
Shein is partnering with third-party testing, inspection and certification (TIC) organizations including Bureau Veritas, Intertek, SGS, and TÜV SÜD to offer sessions for its third-party sellers covering regulatory updates, product safety requirements, testing standards and industry best practices.
During 2026, Shein plans to enhance its governance framework including qualification requirements, multi-layered screening, continuous monitoring and feedback-driven improvement; as well as stricter enforcement and seller training and enablement.
The retailer will also invest in AI-driven monitoring and risk detection systems, supported by human review.
In May 2026, chief Shein rival Temu began integrating testing and certification services from Qima directly into its seller center.
This makes independent product testing, on-site factory inspections, seller training programs, and digital compliance tools from Qima accessible to sellers on the Temu platform."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Shein marketplace seller education series 2025 product safety quality compliance topics","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/shein-expands-marketplace-seller-education-offering-with-product-safety-and-quality-compliance-series-302796523.html","title":"SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series","content":"## News Releases Overview. ## Multimedia Gallery Overview. ## Auto & Transportation Overview. ## View All Auto & Transportation. ## Business Technology Overview. ## View All Business Technology. ## Financial Services & Investing Overview. ## View All Financial Services & Investing. ## Business Technology. ## General Business Overview. ## View All General Business. ## Consumer Technology Overview. ## View All Consumer Technology. ## View All Energy & Natural Resources. ## View All Environ­ment. ## View All Consumer Products & Retail. ## View All Health. SINGAPORE, June 10, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, SHEIN, today announced the launch of a new product safety and quality compliance training series for marketplace sellers, delivered in collaboration with leading third-party testing, inspection and certification (TIC) organizations, including Bureau Veritas, Intertek, SGS, and TÜV SÜD. \"This training series is our commitment in action and a component of SHEIN's continuous efforts in product safety and quality compliance across all layers of the business.","score":0.8559598,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sheingroup.com/newsroom/shein-expands-marketplace-seller-education-offering-with-product-safety-and-quality-compliance","title":"SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series | SHEIN Group","content":"###### SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series • New training series delivered with leading testing organisations will support marketplace sellers on product safety, quality and compliance requirements • Series began on 29 May 2026 with livestreamed training on product safety and quality compliance for children’s toys by TIC partner. # SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series. * *New training series delivered with leading testing organisations will support marketplace sellers on product safety, quality and compliance requirements*. * *Series began on 29 May 2026 with livestreamed training on product safety and quality compliance for children’s toys by TIC partner*.","score":0.84277284,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://novadata.io/resources/news/shein-marketplace-seller-safety-quality-training-june-2026","title":"Shein Expands Marketplace Seller Training to Safety and Quality","content":"Shein expanded its marketplace seller education with a product safety and quality compliance series on June 10, 2026.","score":0.81418616,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ecotextile.com/2026061163421/radar/shein-launches-marketplace-seller-compliance-training","title":"Shein launches marketplace seller compliance training","content":"The programme will address regulatory updates, product safety requirements, testing standards and best practice to help marketplace sellers","score":0.79484755,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://x.com/TechDailyPost/status/2077633390497435850","title":"[ICYMI] SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with ...","content":"SHEIN Expands Marketplace Seller Education Offering with Product Safety and Quality Compliance Series via @TechDailyPost","score":0.7711725,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.68,"request_id":"4c14f65e-ec54-4ab0-9ceb-32e4dcb38e0e"}
